article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.6. 14800.Burnaby Consolidated Fees  Charges Bylaw Amendment Bylaw No. 1 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to temporarily cut plumbing permit fees for some developments
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a bylaw that would temporarily reduce plumbing permit fees for most developments (excluding small-scale multi-unit housing and tenant improvements) to $70 for the first fixture and $39 for each additional one — down from $121 and $67 — if the permit is issued by June 30, 2026. Permits already issued between January 1 and March 10, 2026 could qualify for a partial refund.
briefs.action_required: If you pulled a plumbing permit in Burnaby after Jan 1, 2026, check if you qualify for a refund once this bylaw passes.

key_dates.label: Burnaby reduced plumbing permit fee window closes — deadline to qualify
